---
subtitle: " 2020039-- PERCEPCION REMOTA"
title: "<font style='font-size:1em;'>🗓️ Week 6 <br/> Remote sensing recap </font>"
author: Ivan Lizarazo
institute: '[Universidad Nacional de Colombia]'
date: 11 March 2026
date-meta: 11 March 2026
date-format: "DD MMM YYYY"
toc: true
toc-depth: 1
toc-title: "What we will cover today:"
center-title-slide: false
from: markdown+emoji
format:
  revealjs: 
    fig-responsive: true
    theme: simple
    slide-number: true
    mouse-wheel: false
    preview-links: auto
    logo: /figures/icons/RS.png
    css: /css/styles_slides.css
    footer: '2020039 -- PERCEPCION REMOTA'
---

# Foundations

## How to Specify an Electro-optical Earth Observation Camera?

<p align="center">
<img src="figs/camera1.png" width=100% height=100%>
</p>

[Joseph, 2020](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1w_-q6zgObLj5sjvK-9gFFKBeoSB_wP2U/view?usp=sharing)

## IFOV, GIFOV, and GSD

<p align="center">
<img src="figs/camera2.png" width=60% height=60%>
</p>

## Contrast ratio

<p align="center">
<img src="figs/camera3.png" width=80% height=80%>
</p>

## Modulation transfer function

<p align="center">
<img src="figs/camera4.png" width=80% height=80%>
</p>

## Spectral response curves

<p align="center">
<img src="figs/camera5.png" width=100% height=100%>
</p>

## Bayer mask filter 

<p align="center">
<img src="figs/camera6.png" width=50% height=50%>
</p>

## How far can you measure?

<p align="center">
<img src="figs/HowFAR.png" width=100% height=100%>
</p>

[FLIR](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Pz7UvOA-2IYy8g8FO2hWMdCfRaSRkl7n/view?usp=sharing)


## [Atmospheric correction](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1ddXi-7a5Z-_bnSRTo5qhUBUeWGhrRO0W/view?usp=drive_link)

<p align="center">
<img src="figs/jensen.png" width=60% height=60%>
</p>

## Surface reflectance

<p align="center">
<img src="figs/radiance.png" width=100% height=100%>
</p>


## Reflectance vs color

<p align="center">
<img src="figs/reflectance.png" width=100% height=100%>
</p>

[Griffin, 2019](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC6839875/pdf/pone.0223069.pdf)

# State of art

## Stability and consistency between atmospheric corrections

<p align="center">
<img src="figs/atcors.png" width=100% height=100%>
</p>

[Chraibi, 2022](https://drive.google.com/file/d/110oR9o8i8yr00NhYb1o3zGtLyyFEVj7g/view?usp=sharing)

## MAJA vs Sen2Cor

<p align="center">
<img src="figs/atcors2.png" width=100% height=100%>
</p>


## Atmospheric correction for water-leaving radiance retrievals

<p align="center">
<img src="figs/polymer.png" width=100% height=100%>
</p>

[Karthick, 2024](https://opg.optica.org/oe/fulltext.cfm?uri=oe-32-5-7659)

## Water-leaving radiance retrievals - 1

<p align="center">
<img src="figs/reflectance1.png" width=80% height=80%>
</p>

## Water-leaving radiance retrievals - 2

<p align="center">
<img src="figs/reflectance2.png" width=80% height=80%>
</p>

## Water-leaving radiance retrievals - 3

<p align="center">
<img src="figs/polymer2.png" width=80% height=80%>
</p>


## Atmospheric correction of vegetation reflectance 

<p align="center">
<img src="figs/vegetation.png" width=80% height=80%>
</p>

[Qamar, 2023](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC10385980/pdf/13007_2023_Article_1046.pdf)
